engine: ComfyUI / RealVisXL_V5.0_fp16 (또는 애니풍 kids 체크포인트 검토)
style_token: bright cheerful children's picture book illustration, kids TV cartoon style, soft rounded shapes, thick clean black outlines, flat vivid pastel colors, simple friendly playground background, warm soft lighting, wholesome, hand-drawn look, no text, no letters
negative: photo, photorealistic, 3d render, realistic, scary, horror, creepy, dark, text, letters, words, watermark, ugly, deformed, extra limbs, blurry, adult content

character_sheet.하루: HARU: a cheerful cartoon boy ~8, bright YELLOW HOODIE, big round curious eyes, short black hair with a small front tuft, rosy round cheeks, excited open smile — flat cartoon mascot, thick clean outlines
character_sheet.아이봇: AIBOT: a small round white robot, big round screen face with two round eyes and a small smile, one short BLUE ANTENNA with round tip, stubby arms, sweet clumsy 'friend who makes mistakes' vibe, pastel blue accents
character_sheet.생각쌤: SAENGGAK-SSAEM: a warm cartoon Korean teacher, BIG ROUND GLASSES, cozy brown knit VEST over white shirt, gentle smile, kind questioning pose (never lecturing)
character_sheet.퐁퐁: PONGPONG: a tiny fairy from a soft PINK CLOUD / speech-bubble body, big shiny eyes, small translucent wings, tiny heart antenna, holds a small glowing sentence CARD, sparkly pastel pink

consistency_note: 각 컷 프롬프트 앞에 등장 캐릭터의 character_sheet 문장을 그대로 붙여 외형을 고정한다. 완전 일관성은 IP-Adapter/캐릭터 시트 참조가 필요(미해결 과제) → 렌더 후 사람이 컷 선별.

scenes.prompt: all four characters together jumping happily on a colorful bright AI playground, confetti, joyful opening scene, wide composition
the teacher waving hello while the child hops excitedly, the little fairy floating with a glowing speech bubble, sunny playground center
the child standing in front of the round white robot, cheerfully asking, robot starting to draw with effort, cute
a funny WRONG cat drawing on a floating canvas — odd colors and a silly weird expression, space background; the child surprised, the robot embarrassed with a sweat drop, fairy tilting
the teacher kneeling to the child's eye level asking a gentle question, the child thinking hard with a finger on chin, thoughtful warm mood
the fairy showing a glowing speech bubble hint, the child speaking clearly and carefully, the robot listening attentively, determined cheerful
a lovely cute WHITE cat sitting on a YELLOW cushion on the canvas, the child cheering with arms up, the robot proud, the teacher smiling warmly
the four characters in a row putting hands together making a promise, warm glow, heartwarming
all four waving goodbye and singing, musical notes floating, bright confetti ending scene, wide composition

design_locked: 2026-07-05 · 4캐릭터 기준 얼굴 확정(assets/kids_ai_show/char/*.png). 전 컷은 이 시트 문장을 앞에 붙여 외형 고정.
style_lock_note: RealVisXL는 사람 캐릭터를 사진으로 렌더하는 경향 → 사람(하루/생각쌤)은 (flat 2D cartoon mascot illustration:1.4) + NEG (photograph/photo/realistic:1.5~) 필수.
